info.title: Resmo API
info.description: Resmo is a cloud-native asset visibility and security platform. The Resmo API enables querying your cloud asset inventory, managing integrations, rules, notifications, and audit logs programmatically. Resmo uses SQL-like queries to search across all integrated cloud resources.

post.description: Run a SQL-like query against your Resmo asset inventory. Supports querying any integrated resource type with WHERE clauses, JOINs, aggregations, and more. Results are returned as JSON.

get.description: List all resource types available in your Resmo inventory
List all resources of a specific type
Get a specific resource by type and ID

post.description: Trigger a sync for an integration

get.description: List all security and compliance rules
Get rule details and evaluation status

post.description: Invite a user to the workspace

delete.description: Remove a user from the workspace
Revoke and delete an API key

query.description: SQL-like query (e.g. SELECT * FROM aws_ec2_instance WHERE state = 'running')
SQL query that defines the rule condition

config.description: Channel-specific config (e.g. webhook URL, email addresses)

bearerAuth.description: API key passed as Bearer token in Authorization header. Generate keys from Settings > API Keys in the Resmo dashboard.
